summary: Plan-only classification for five independent open PRs. No merge action is safe because the artifact lacks Codex /review preflight and several PRs have active waiting-on-author, broad-delta, failed-check, dirty-branch, or unhydrated-comment blockers. One narrow PR has a concrete maintainer-modifiable repair path.

actions.reason: Broad uneditable contributor PR with active author follow-up requires maintainer judgment before merge or replacement.
Useful narrow contributor PR, but failing proof/type/check jobs block merge; repair the existing branch before any merge preflight.
Large UI/i18n contributor PR with waiting-on-author state and incomplete discussion preflight requires maintainer judgment.
Dirty feature/config PR with compatibility risk and active waiting-on-author discussion needs maintainer decision before repair or merge.
Message-delivery PR has failed behavior proof plus waiting-on-author discussion, so merge or repair needs maintainer judgment after comment/proof review.

needs_human: #81333: broad uneditable i18n PR with waiting-on-author status.
#81714: large i18n PR with waiting-on-author status and unhydrated discussion.
#82165: dirty compatibility-affecting feature/config PR with waiting-on-author status.
#82354: failed behavior proof and waiting-on-author discussion for message-delivery change.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #81341 by keeping the existing narrow ACP bound-thread follow-up fix, investigating the failing proof/type/check jobs, updating the branch only as needed, and rerunning targeted validation before merge preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair #81341 ACP bound thread follow-up delivery
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair plan for #81341: keep the contributor's focused dispatch suppression fix, inspect the failing Real behavior proof/check/check-test-types jobs, make the smallest branch update needed, rerun pnpm -s vitest run src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts and pnpm check:changed, then run Codex /review before merge consideration. Source PR credit: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81341 by qiyueqiu/qiqi.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for qiyueqiu/qiqi on #81341.
Any repair commit or final merge note should credit the contributor's ACP bound-thread follow-up delivery fix.
